name: teamwork-skill
description: Codex-first skills, with Cursor and Claude Code adapters, for evidence-grounded research, debugging, planning, execution, review, and long-running goals.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-grounded teamwork for complex Codex research and engineering.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-first skill package for research, reproducible debugging, reviewable planning, scoped execution, fresh review, and long-running goals. Simple work stays on the native fast path; independent subagents are used only when they improve the result. Host-native interaction tools remain in control.
defaultPrompt: Research this problem from primary sources and project evidence, then recommend the next safe action.
Diagnose this reproducible failure with logs or runtime evidence before changing code.
Create a scoped, reviewable plan with sourced required values and explicit verification.
Execute the accepted scope, verify the result, and report any genuine blocker.
Use independent Codex agents when the work splits cleanly, while keeping integration and final verification with the main agent.
Strictly review this result for unsupported claims, risky fallbacks, and unnecessary complexity.
Initialize or refresh Teamwork for one selected repository without changing unrelated user or project configuration.
